findings.description: The mother of Charles Kingsley McAloney (b. 1911) is Jessie MacPhee (maiden name also indexed 'McPhee' / 'MacPhie'), born about 1882 in Nova Scotia, Canada. She married Charles Smith McAloney in 1907 and appears as his wife in the family's Massachusetts census households.

target_person.name: Jessie MacPhee
target_person.birth: about 1882, Hants County, Nova Scotia, Canada

supporting_sources: 1920, 1930, and 1940 U.S. Census — Charles/Jessie McAloney household in Somerville and Easton, Massachusetts (Jessie enumerated as wife and mother of the household)
California Death Index, 1940-1997 — Charles's entry names the mother's maiden name 'Mcphee'
1911 Massachusetts birth record and the Social Security NUMIDENT file — name the parents
